channel.title: Data Science on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Data Science on LiaScript

item.title: PGlite for LiaScript: Full PostgreSQL in the Browser
item.description: Teaching SQL usually means setting up a database server, managing connections, and keeping student environments in sync. The PGlite template removes all of that.

item.title: SpreadSheet for LiaScript: Excel-Style Interactive Tables in Your Course
item.description: Interactive data tables are a staple of business, science, and data literacy education. The SpreadSheet template brings JSSpreadsheet (jspreadsheet.js) into LiaScript, enabling student-editable tables with Excel-style formulas, dropdown selectors, checkboxes, sorting, search, and persistence — all without a server.

item.title: Vega for LiaScript: Interactive Data Visualizations in Your Course
item.description: Data visualization is central to data science, statistics, and quantitative research education. Good charts communicate insights that tables cannot. Interactive charts — where students can hover, filter, and explore — communicate even more.

item.title: AlaSQL for LiaScript: Teach SQL and Query CSV Data in the Browser
item.description: SQL is not only for relational databases. With the AlaSQL template, you can run SQL queries inside LiaScript courses against in-memory tables, JavaScript arrays, and CSV files — entirely in the browser.

item.title: DuckDB for LiaScript: Teach Data Analytics Directly in the Browser
item.description: Modern data analysis relies on SQL. With the DuckDB template, you can teach analytical queries interactively — learners write real SQL, run it immediately, and see results as formatted tables or charts, right inside the course.

item.title: Pyodide for LiaScript: Run Python Directly in Your Course
item.description: Python is the most widely taught programming language in the world. With the Pyodide template, you can bring it directly into your LiaScript course — executable, editable, and fully browser-based.

item.title: SQLite for LiaScript: Teach SQL Interactively in the Browser
item.description: SQL is the foundational language of data. With the SQLite template, you can teach it interactively — learners write real SQL, run it immediately, and see the results as formatted tables, right inside the course.
